steps.title: Locate the point at x = 3
steps.content:
Locate x = 3 on the horizontal axis. Draw a vertical line up to the curve; the intersection occurs at approximately y = 13632.
$$(3, 13632)$$

steps.title: Compare to answer choices
steps.content:
Compute the absolute difference between the read value 13632 and each choice:
  • Choice A: |13632 - 9619| = 4013
  • Choice B: |13632 - 13632| = 0
  • Choice C: |13632 - 19320| = 5688
  • Choice D: |13632 - 23000| = 9368
The smallest difference is for choice B, so the predicted value closest to the graph reading is choice B.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
